title: lilium harrisianum
intro: Lilium harrisianum, also known as Harris' lily, is a species of lily native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Lilium harrisianum include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to help manage conditions such as arthritis and other inflammatory diseases. Herbal preparations of Lilium harrisianum include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
